venues.name: Atlantide
venues.description: Main dining room — elegant bar-and-grill format with grilled seafood, prime steaks, and daily-changing contemporary menus. Open-seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Kitchen
venues.description: Sea And Land Taste restaurant added in Silver Muse's December 2025 refurbishment, replacing Indochine. Destination-driven menus rotating by voyage, celebrating regional producers and local culinary traditions. Complimentary; dinner only, open seating.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian restaurant on Deck 8 with panoramic views. Buffet breakfast and lunch; evening à la carte with handmade pasta, veal ossobuco, and seasonal seafood. Slow-food philosophy. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: Poolside casual dining by day. In the evening transforms into Hot Rocks — guests cook prime meats and seafood on 400°C volcanic lava stones at the table. Reservations required evenings. Complimentary.

venues.name: Spaccanapoli
venues.description: Open-air poolside Neapolitan pizzeria with wood-fired pies and Italian snacks. Adjacent gelato bar with rotating flavors. Open for lunch and dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: Silver Note
venues.description: Late-night jazz supper club open from 8 pm. Tapas-style international small plates with live jazz and blues. Each guest orders several individual plates. Complimentary.

venues.name: Kaiseki
venues.description: Sushi and sashimi bar by day (complimentary). Transforms to a teppanyaki and Japanese fine-dining venue at dinner — miso black cod, wagyu beef, snow crab. Dinner supplement approximately $40 per person; reservations required.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: Silversea's signature French fine-dining restaurant in partnership with Relais & Châteaux. Ingredients sourced from France; Dover sole tableside, classic soufflés, haute cuisine. Intimate ~40-seat room. Dinner only; supplement approximately $60 per person.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Lab / Chef's Table
venues.description: Culinary workshop and test kitchen added in the 2025 refit. Daytime cooking classes and tastings; evening Chef's Table with an 11-course tasting menu. Surcharge applies for Chef's Table.

venues.name: Arts Café
venues.description: All-day café serving specialty coffees, pastries, sandwiches, light bites, and a selection of wines. Complimentary throughout the day.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining. Full menu service from breakfast through late night delivered to every suite.
